/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/repository/UserRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/repository/FlatRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/patterns/logger.cpp.o -o tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a -lpqxx /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
